title: EvalScope Benchmark MCP
description: EvalScope Benchmark MCP is a paid remote MCP endpoint for AI SDK benchmark dashboard. It exposes structured JSON tools, a public server card, token-based access, usage receipts, and audit-ready workflow evidence for AI agents and coding teams.
